about

System Overview

background process running since 2006

📀
me! ↑

hello, i'm kailyn

a software developer based in cincinnati, ohio. i'm currently in a summer internship @ kroger technology & digital and am working on getting my degree from the university of cincinnati's school of information technology! i build projects that feel good to use — functional, accessible, and a little bit whimsical in the best way.

when i'm not developing, you'll find me hiking, modding my vast collection of older devices (nintendo 3ds, xbox 360, wii u, iphone 4, and more), riding in my vw beetle, or tinkering with my computer (which i built myself!)

internship

groovy-proxy

locally hosted node.js proxy server for llm chat models

a local proxy server that allows users to interact with large language models (llms) through a chat interface, enabling seamless communication with AI models.
